Kidney shaped bean either elongated or plump in shape. Colour ranges from dusky pink to deep red. Removed from its pod. Dried and uncooked. Also known as raajma.

foodName: Bean, red kidney, dried, boiled, no added salt, drained
description: Kidney shaped bean either elongated or plump in shape. Colour ranges from dusky pink to deep red. Removed from its pod. Dried beans soaked overnight, cooked by boiling in water with no added salt, then drained.  Also known as raajma.

Flat kidney shaped bean can be white or green, large or small.  Removed from its pod. Popularly called butter bean. Produced in USA, South America and Madagascar, imported into Australia. Dried and uncooked.
Small oval shaped, creamy yellow coloured beans with a floury texture from the pod of soybean plant. Beans canned in sweetened brine, then drained.
Dried mushrooms, unspecified species, commonly sold sliced for reconstitution prior to use.

foodName: Soy beverage, regular fat, ultra high temperature
description: Beverage prepared from soy beans and ultra heat treated to preserve it. Beverage is not reduced fat.

foodName: Soy beverage, powder, dry (not infant food)
description: Dried extract of soy beans, used to prepare reconstituted soy beverages.
Phospholipid-rich granular extract of soy beans, often used in baking and as an emulsifier, as purchased from supermarkets for domestic use.
A thick paste made from fermented and processed soya beans mixed with grain and injected with a yeast mould.

foodName: Tofu (soy bean curd), firm, as purchased
description: Soy bean extract, commercially prepared, that has set to a firm texture. Ingredients include water, soybeans, glucono-delta lactone, nigari (magnesium chloride).

foodName: Tofu (soy bean curd), silken or soft, as purchased
description: Soy bean extract, commercially prepared, that has set to a soft, custard-like texture. Ingredients include water, soybeans, glucono-delta lactone, emulsifier and calcium chloride.
Commercial product with consistency and appearance similar to dairy-based cheese, but prepared from soya beans. Canola oil added.

foodName: Soy beverage, reduced fat (fat approximately 1.5%), unflavoured, added fibre
description: Beverage prepared from soy beans, with added fibre. Does not contain added flavouring substances. Purchased ready to drink. Includes soy milk labelled as being organically produced.

foodName: Soy beverage, reduced fat (fat approximately 1.5%), unflavoured,  added protein
description: Beverage prepared from soy beans with high protein content and a reduced fat content (fat approximately 1.5%). Does not contain added flavouring substances. Purchased ready to drink. Includes soy milk labelled as being organically produced.

foodName: Tofu (soy bean curd), firm, stir-fried with no added fat
description: Soy bean extract, commercially prepared, that has set to a firm texture. Ingredients include water, soybeans, glucono-delta lactone, nigari (magnesium chloride). Cooked by stir frying with no added fat.

foodName: Tofu (soy bean curd), firm, baked with no added fat
description: Soy bean extract, commercially prepared, that has set to a firm texture. Ingredients include water, soybeans, glucono-delta lactone, nigari (magnesium chloride). Cooked by baking with no added fat.

foodName: Tofu (soy bean curd), silken or soft, stir-fried with no added fat
description: Soy bean extract, commercially prepared, that has set to a soft, custard-like texture. Ingredients include water, soybeans, glucono-delta lactone, emulsifier, calcium chloride. Cooked by stir frying with no added fat.
Thin, dry wafer, generally made from legume flour. Requires cooking before consumption.

foodName: Pappadam, microwaved with no added salt or fat
description: Dry, wafer like discs prepared from legume flour, cooked briefly in a microwave until puffed and crispy with no added salt or fat.

foodName: Soy yoghurt, low fat (fat less than 1%), vanilla flavoured
description: Yoghurt-style sweet product based on soy milk rather than dairy milk, with vanilla flavouring.

foodName: Soy yoghurt, regular fat (fat approximately 3%), vanilla flavoured
description: Yoghurt-style sweet product based on soy milk rather than dairy milk, with vanilla flavouring.

foodName: Tofu (soy bean curd), smoked, as purchased
description: Soy bean extract, commercially prepared, that has set to a firm texture and to which smoke flavour has been added. Other ingredients include water, soybeans, nigari, and salt.

foodName: Soy bean curd skins, dried, rehydrated in boiling water
description: Sheets of dried soybean curd, rehydrated in boiling water.

foodName: Soy beverage, regular fat (fat approximately 3%), unflavoured
description: Beverage prepared from soy beans, purchased ready to drink. Does not contain artificial flavouring substances.

foodName: Soy beverage, reduced fat (fat approximately 1%), unflavoured
description: Beverage prepared from soy beans with a reduced fat content (fat approximately 1.5%), purchased ready to drink.
Commercially prepared frozen iced product based on tofu, with vanilla flavouring.

foodName: Soy beverage, low fat (fat approximately 0.5%), unflavoured
description: Beverage prepared from soy beans with a reduced fat content (fat approximately 0.5%), purchased ready to drink.

foodName: Soy beverage, reduced fat (fat approximately 1.5%), unflavoured
description: Beverage prepared from soy beans with a reduced fat content (fat approximately 1.5%), purchased ready to drink.
Sweetening product in liquid formulation containing aspartame as the intense sweetener.

foodName: Intense sweetener, containing aspartame, powdered formulation
description: Sweetening product in powdered formulation containing aspartame as the intense sweetener, also containing lactose, food additives.
Sweetening product in tablet formulation containing aspartame as the intense sweetener. Also contains vegetable gum, L-leucine and lactose.

foodName: Intense sweetener, containing aspartame & acesulfame-potassium, tablet
description: Sweetening product in tablet formulation containing aspartame and acesulphame potassium as the intense sweeteners. May also contain lactose, L-leucine, glycine, crosscarmellose sodium and emulsifiers.
Sweetening product in tablet formulation containing sodium saccharin as the intense sweetener. May also contain food additives such as sodium bicarbonate, tartaric acid and stabilisers.

foodName: Intense sweetener, containing sucralose, powdered formulation
description: Sweetening product in powdered formulation containing sucralose as the intense sweetener, also containing maltodextrin.
Sweetening product in tablet formulation containing sucralose as the intense sweetener. May also contain lactose, L-leucine, crosscarmellose sodium and magnesium stearate.
Sweetening product in liquid formulation containing sodium saccharin, water and preservative.
